EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of auto renewal removal due to claim in progress.
EmailTemplate.name: AR Removal - Claim
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Insurance Renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
You will have received an email from Kingsbridge confirming that we have removed your account from automatic renewal. Please be advised that the email you received is generated by our system when a potential claim has been reported.
No further action is required from you at this stage and we will contact you closer to renewal to confirm your details.
If you have any questions please do not hesitate to contact us.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
